title: ActiveCampaign vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Moosend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Moosend are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels at enterprise-grade automation and CRM integration, while Moosend offers affordability and simplicity for small teams. This guide helps you decide which platform best fits your marketing goals and budget.

comparison_table.tool_b: Yes, unlimited emails on free plan

comparison_table.tool_a: Lead scoring, site tracking, SMS, dynamic content
comparison_table.tool_b: Landing pages, unlimited emails, real-time analytics

choose_a_if: You need advanced CRM and lead scoring capabilities for enterprise-level marketing
Your business requires SMS integration and sophisticated automation workflows
You're willing to invest in a platform with proven enterprise features
choose_b_if: You're a small business or startup looking to minimize costs with a free plan
You want unlimited email sends without paying per-subscriber fees
You need easy-to-use landing pages and subscription forms out of the box

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is superior for enterprise automation, CRM, and lead scoring, making it better for larger organizations. Moosend wins for affordability and ease of use, particularly for small businesses and startups. Choose based on your budget and complexity requirements.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, offering a free plan with up to 1,000 subscribers and unlimited emails, then starting at $9/month for paid plans. ActiveCampaign has no free tier and begins at $15/month. For budget-conscious teams, Moosend is the clear winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email export and import processes. You can typically export your subscriber lists and campaign data from Moosend and import them into ActiveCampaign. Check with their support teams for specific migration assistance and any data format requirements.
